recommendations.title: Feed
recommendations.overview: A cybercrime investigator tracks a man suspected of force-feeding women to death.

recommendations.title: The Lawnmower Man
recommendations.overview: A simple man is turned into a genius through the application of computer science.

recommendations.title: Virtuosity

recommendations.title: The Banker
recommendations.overview: In the 1960s, two entrepreneurs hatch an ingenious business plan to fight for housing integration—and equal access to the American Dream.

recommendations.title: Man-Thing
recommendations.genres: Action, Horror, Adventure, Science Fiction, Romance
recommendations.overview: Agents of an oil tycoon vanish while exploring a swamp marked for drilling. The local sheriff investigates and faces a Seminole legend come to life: Man-Thing, a shambling swamp-monster whose touch burns those who feel fear.

recommendations.title: Highlander: The Source
recommendations.overview: The world is falling into chaos. As he roams a crumbling city, Duncan MacLeod, the Highlander, remembers happier times before the love of his life left... Hopeless and alone, MacLeod finds his way to a band of immortal companions, including his myste

recommendations.title: Strange Darling
recommendations.overview: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer’s vicious murder spree.

recommendations.title: Top Cat Begins
recommendations.overview: Top Cat and his new feline friend hatch a scheme to steal from the fearful Mr. Big.

recommendations.title: Take Shelter
recommendations.overview: Plagued by a series of apocalyptic visions, a young husband and father questions whether to shelter his family from a coming storm, or from himself.

recommendations.title: The Canal
recommendations.overview: A man who suspects his wife is cheating on him begins having nightmarish visions of an evil presence that he believes inhabits his house.
